## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Keep it focused on one concern. -->

## Related

<!-- Link issues / audit findings / plans (e.g. plans/006, finding M5). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Focused scope** — one logical change; no unrelated edits.
- [ ] **Tests** added or updated where the change warrants them (`testing.md`).
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes locally.
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (no new `any` / `@ts-ignore` / `@ts-expect-error`).
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npx expo-doctor@latest` passes.
- [ ] `npx expo export --platform web` builds.
- [ ] **Screenshots / recordings** attached for any visible UI change.
- [ ] **No secrets or credentials** in code, config, logs, or commits.
- [ ] **No private construction-site data** (real reports, photos, client info) included.
- [ ] **Migration / rollback** considered for any storage-schema or data change.
- [ ] **Security impact** reviewed against `.claude/rules/security.md`.
